scripts.wasm:build:dev: rm -rf src/wasm/pkg && cd wasm && wasm-pack build --dev --target bundler --out-dir ../src/wasm/pkg
scripts.wasm:build:prod: rm -rf src/wasm/pkg && cd wasm && wasm-pack build --release --target bundler --out-dir ../src/wasm/pkg && if command -v wasm-opt >/dev/null 2>&1; then wasm-opt -Oz src/wasm/pkg/editor_wasm_bg.wasm -o src/wasm/pkg/editor_wasm_bg.wasm || true; else echo 'wasm-opt not found — skipping wasm-opt step'; fi
scripts.wasm:watch: cd wasm && watchexec -e rs -- 'npm run wasm:build:dev'
